article_title: Bylaw 14753 — Housing Agreement (4612, 4664 Lougheed Highway and 2040, 2140 and 2150 Alpha Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable rental units at Brentwood development through binding housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a legal housing agreement with Brentwood BT Development Limited, requiring a set number of below-market rental units at 4612–4664 Lougheed Highway and nearby Alpha Avenue addresses. The agreement is registered on the property title, meaning the affordable rental rules stay with the land permanently, regardless of future ownership.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property near this Brentwood site, review how new non-market rental supply may affect local rents and tenant demand.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
